Hi, I've made some minor improvements in the documentation, particularly in the installation section. Here are the changes I have implemented: 

- Updated terminology from 'Python environment' to 'Python virtual environment' for clarity and accuracy.
- Added code formatting to 'conda' and 'conda-forge' for improved readability and consistency.
- Updated section title from 'Installing miniforge' to 'Installing miniforge (and conda)' to reflect the inclusion of conda in the installation process.
- Clarified the sentence by specifying that 'Miniforge' will install 'conda' for better context and understanding.
- "Revised the instruction for clarity: 'For Linux & Mac, run the downloaded script above using the following command:'.
- Updated the instruction to include restarting the system if changes don't take effect for better clarity.
- Updated terminology from 'environment' to 'virtual environment' in multiple instances for clarity and consistency.
- Added a command to verify the installation of 'sunpy' using 'conda list sunpy' for improved user guidance.

Thank you for reviewing my changes! I hope these improvements enhance the documentation. I'm open to any feedback or suggestions :)

Describe the feature

More information about VSO data acquisition status.

### Proposed solution

The VSO has a "health report" page here: https://docs.virtualsolar.org/wiki/VSOHealthReport . It would be useful for the user to be able to have a link to this health report when Fido results that use `VSOClient` are shown. This would look something like what is the typical output shown in https://docs.sunpy.org/en/stable/tutorial/acquiring_data/index.html . I have added in an extra line:

```
import astropy.units as u

Fido.search(a.Time('2012/3/4', '2012/3/4'), a.Instrument.aia,
            a.Wavelength(171*u.angstrom))  
<sunpy.net.fido_factory.UnifiedResponse object at ...>
Results from 1 Provider:

Latest VSO data retrieval status available at https://docs.virtualsolar.org/wiki/VSOHealthReport
1 Results from the VSOClient:
```

pull request introduces an update to the output of the Fido results when using the VSOClient. The change adds a link to the latest VSO Health Report, which provides up-to-date status on VSO data retrieval. 

### Changes
The output of the Fido results now includes the followinf string: 
`Latest VSO data retrieval status available at https://docs.virtualsolar.org/wiki/VSOHealthReport`
This will provide users with a direct link to the VSO Health Report for more status on the data  retrieval

### Example Output:
```
Results from 1 Provider:

1 Results from the VSOClient:
Source: http://vso.stanford.edu/cgi-bin/search
Total estimated size: 67.789 Mbyte

                                                                     Angstrom                                                                        Mibyte 
----------------------- ----------------------- ------ ---------- -------------- -------- --------- -------- ------------ ------------- ----------- --------
2012-03-04 00:00:00.000 2012-03-04 00:00:01.000    SDO        AIA 171.0 .. 171.0     JSOC intensity   NARROW         4096          4096    FULLDISK 64.64844

Latest VSO data retrieval status available at https://docs.virtualsolar.org/wiki/VSOHealthReport
```
Feel free to leave any feedback or suggestions on this change. Thanks

pull request introduces an update to the output of the Fido results when using the VSOClient. The change adds a link to the latest VSO Health Report, which provides up-to-date status on VSO data retrieval. 

### Changes
The output of the Fido results now includes the followinf string: 
`Latest VSO data retrieval status available at https://docs.virtualsolar.org/wiki/VSOHealthReport`
This will provide users with a direct link to the VSO Health Report for more status on the data  retrieval

### Example Output:
```
Results from 1 Provider:

1 Results from the VSOClient:
Source: http://vso.stanford.edu/cgi-bin/search
Total estimated size: 67.789 Mbyte

       Start Time               End Time        Source Instrument   Wavelength   Provider  Physobs  Wavetype Extent Width Extent Length Extent Type   Size  
                                                                     Angstrom                                                                        Mibyte 
----------------------- ----------------------- ------ ---------- -------------- -------- --------- -------- ------------ ------------- ----------- --------
2012-03-04 00:00:00.000 2012-03-04 00:00:01.000    SDO        AIA 171.0 .. 171.0     JSOC intensity   NARROW         4096          4096    FULLDISK 64.64844

Latest VSO data retrieval status available at https://docs.virtualsolar.org/wiki/VSOHealthReport
```
Feel free to leave any feedback or suggestions on this change. Thanks

### Related Issue:
- Resolves #7853

pull request introduces an update to the output of the Fido results when using the VSOClient. The change adds a link to the latest VSO Health Report, which provides up-to-date status on VSO data retrieval. 

### Changes
The output of the Fido results now includes the followinf string: 
`Latest VSO data retrieval status available at https://docs.virtualsolar.org/wiki/VSOHealthReport`
This will provide users with a direct link to the VSO Health Report for more status on the data  retrieval

### Example Output:
```
Results from 1 Provider:

1 Results from the VSOClient:
Source: http://vso.stanford.edu/cgi-bin/search
Total estimated size: 67.789 Mbyte

       Start Time               End Time        Source Instrument   Wavelength   Provider  Physobs  Wavetype Extent Width Extent Length Extent Type   Size  
                                                                     Angstrom                                                                        Mibyte 
----------------------- ----------------------- ------ ---------- -------------- -------- --------- -------- ------------ ------------- ----------- --------
2012-03-04 00:00:00.000 2012-03-04 00:00:01.000    SDO        AIA 171.0 .. 171.0     JSOC intensity   NARROW         4096          4096    FULLDISK 64.64844

Latest VSO data retrieval status available at https://docs.virtualsolar.org/wiki/VSOHealthReport
```
Feel free to leave any feedback or suggestions on this change. Thanks

### Related Issue:
- Resolves #7853
